name: Caring Brands, Inc.
business: Caring Brands is a wellness consumer products company offering over-the-counter and cosmetic products including hair loss treatments, eczema and psoriasis treatments, vitiligo solutions, and a jellyfish sting protective suncare line. The company sells directly to consumers through its own e-commerce platform and third-party marketplaces like Amazon, and also licenses products to international partners such as Taisho Pharmaceutical in Japan and Cosmofix/San Pellegrino in India and other territories.
sellsTo: Licensing partners in India, Japan, and other international markets

exposures.sentence: We are a wellness consumer products company. We offer several over-the-counter (OTC) and cosmetic consumer products.
Photocil is a narrow band UV filter that focuses UV in the 311nm range which is therapeutic for vitiligo and psoriasis.

Hair Enzyme Booster (JW-700), previously known as Minoxidil Booster, is designed to improve Minoxidil efficacy by increasing necessary enzyme levels and must be used in combination with FDA-approved minoxidil products.
CB-101 treatment for Atopic Dermatitis (Eczema) is a topical over-the-counter treatment for atopic dermatitis (eczema) with dual-action relief from aspartame (ASN) and colloidal oatmeal.
NoStingz is planned to undergo reformulation under Caring Brands as a sunscreen product designed to provide protection against both UV rays and jellyfish stings.

catalysts.event: Relaunch of Photocil in the United States
catalysts.sentence: We are currently preparing for its relaunch in the United States, which is targeted for 2026, as we explore manufacturing and marketing options.

CB-101 eczema treatment is planned to undergo reformulation, which we expect to complete in Q4 2025/Q1 2026, and it is anticipated to be available online in the US in the second quarter of 2026 as an over-the-counter product under a USP monograph.

catalysts.event: CB-101 available online in the US
catalysts.sentence: CB-101 eczema treatment is planned to undergo reformulation, which we expect to complete in Q4 2025/Q1 2026, and it is anticipated to be available online in the US in the second quarter of 2026 as an over-the-counter product under a USP monograph.

catalysts.event: Taisho commercial launch of Hair Enzyme Booster (JW-700) in Japan
catalysts.sentence: Licensed to Taisho, a $2.6 billion revenue company and Japan's leading seller of minoxidil products. They expect to launch the product commercially in 2025.

catalysts.event: Hair Enzyme Booster (JW-700) launched on Amazon
catalysts.sentence: Hair Enzyme Booster (JW-700) was launched on Amazon on October 28, 2024, and became available on NOVODX's e-commerce platform on December 11, 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Global phototherapy treatment market projected to rise from USD $1.9 billion in 2023 to USD $3.23 billion by 2033, at a CAGR of around 5.2%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Future Market Insights (2023), the global phototherapy treatment market is projected to rise from ~ USD $1.9 billion in 2023 to ~ USD $3.23 billion by 2033, at a CAGR of around 5.2% during the forecast period from 2023 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: India phototherapy market expected to expand with CAGR of approximately 7.8% as of 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: In India, the market is expected to expand even faster, with an estimated CAGR of approximately 7.8% as of 2023, driven by a large patient base, increasing prevalence of skin disorders, greater awareness of noninvasive treatments, and improved healthcare infrastructure (Future Market Insights, 2023).

tamClaims.claim: Global psoriasis treatment market was worth ~ $34 billion globally in the 12 months ending June 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by Nature Reviews Drug Discovery (2024), the global psoriasis treatment market was worth ~ $34 billion globally in the 12 months ending June 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Global psoriasis market expected to reach ~ USD $54-67 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the same report (Nature Reviews Drug Discovery, 2024), with the current growth rate (CAGR of 8 10% from 2023 to 2030), the global market is expected to reach ~ USD $54-67 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global vitiligo treatment market valued at ~ USD 538.90 million in 2024, projected to reach ~ USD 807.70 million by 2034 at CAGR of 4.60%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by Expert Market Research (2024), the global vitiligo treatment market was valued at ~ USD 538.90 million in 2024. The global market is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.60% from 2025 to 2034, reaching ~ USD 807.70 million by 2034 (Expert Market Research, 2024).

tamClaims.claim: Minoxidil market valued at $1.5 billion in 2022, expected to grow to $2.5 billion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: Minoxidil market was valued at $1.5 billion in 2022 and is expected to grow to $2.5 billion by 2032.
